test_cases.title: User can opt out of system notifications
test_cases.expected_result: Notifications are disabled; the user does not receive further notifications after opting out

notes: The requirement is severely under-specified: no notification type, delivery channel, or triggering event is defined. The single test case covers the opt-out path as the only clearly testable behaviour. Recommend clarifying: (1) which notification types exist, (2) what delivery channels are supported (email, in-app, push), and (3) what events trigger notifications.
